description_long: This object is a compact revolver-style handgun with a matte black frame and a green ergonomic grip. The cylinder is metallic gray and appears robust, designed to hold multiple rounds, and is integrated seamlessly into the frame. The barrel is short and solid, with a hexagonal muzzle and a simple, unadorned finish. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. The grip is contoured for comfort, with a smooth surface and a slight palm swell, likely made from a polymer or composite material. No visible markings, engravings, or logos are present on the frame, barrel, or grip, giving the handgun a utilitarian and minimalist appearance.
description: A compact, matte black revolver with a green ergonomic grip and a metallic gray cylinder. The design is minimalist, with a short barrel and no visible markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the revolver, highlighting the green grip, black frame, and metallic gray cylinder.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the hexagonal muzzle and the alignment of the barrel and cylinder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip contour and the cylinder's integration into the frame.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the back of the grip and the width of the frame and cylinder.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is visually ergonomic, with a gentle palm swell and a smooth, matte green finish. It is contoured to fit comfortably in the hand, lacking any visible checkering, stippling, or finger grooves. The surface appears to be made from a polymer or composite material, providing a non-slip but smooth texture. There are no visible logos, embellishments, or decorative elements on the grip, emphasizing a utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, forming a smooth arc around the trigger area. It is integrated seamlessly into the frame, with no undercuts, squared-off edges, or additional accessories. The surface is smooth and untextured, and the guard is sized to allow easy access to the trigger while providing protection.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and solid, with a hexagonal muzzle profile. It has a standard, non-threaded, and non-ported design, lacking any compensators or external features. The exterior is matte black, matching the frame, and there are no visible markings or special finishes.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or frame. The surfaces are plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not have a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The grip base is flat and smooth, with no extensions, bevels, flares, finger rests, logos, or texturing visible.
